title: Deploy to a VPS
description: Get your FastAPI app running on a real server with nginx, systemd, and HTTPS.

title: Auth in Django
description: Use Django's built-in auth system to add login, signup, and per-user data.

title: Password Reset (Django)
description: Add password reset to your Django app using the built-in views - most of the work is already done.

title: Todo App with Django
description: Django's ORM, admin panel, templates, forms, and a REST API with Django REST Framework.

title: AI Integration
description: Connect your todo app to an AI API, inject database context into prompts, and return structured AI responses.
icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28"><rect width="28" height="28" rx="6" fill="#1e2a3a"/><text x="14" y="20" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#9ba6be" text-anchor="middle">AI</text></svg>

title: API Key Authentication
description: Protect your API endpoints with API keys - the simplest and most common auth pattern for server-to-server APIs.

title: Authentication with FastAPI
description: Secure your API with JWT tokens, password hashing, and protected endpoints using Depends.

title: Background Tasks
description: Run slow work after the response is sent - emails, notifications, and processing without blocking the user. Includes Celery for reliable task queues.

title: Dashboard API
description: Build an API designed to power a dashboard - aggregations, stats, and date-range filtering for your todo app.

title: Databases
description: SQLite, SQLAlchemy, the session pattern, related models, and when to move to PostgreSQL.

title: Sending Email
description: Send todo reminders and digests using SMTP and Resend, fire emails in the background with BackgroundTasks, and schedule a daily digest with APScheduler.

title: Calling External APIs
description: Make async HTTP requests with httpx, handle errors from third-party APIs, and manage secrets with .env files.

title: Frontend with HTMX, Alpine.js and daisyUI
description: Build a server-rendered interactive frontend for your FastAPI app. HTMX handles dynamic updates without writing JavaScript, daisyUI provides styled components, and Alpine.js manages client-side state.

title: HTTP and the Web
description: How HTTP requests and responses work, what status codes mean, and how JSON ties it together.

title: ML Model API with Pandas
description: Train a model with Pandas and scikit-learn, save it, load it into FastAPI at startup, and serve predictions through a typed endpoint.

title: OAuth & Third-Party APIs
description: Let users log in with Google and make API calls on their behalf - the OAuth2 flow from start to finish.

title: Password Reset (FastAPI)
description: Add forgot-password and reset-password endpoints using secure time-limited tokens.

title: PostgreSQL
description: Move your app from SQLite to a production-grade PostgreSQL database with Alembic migrations.

title: Python for FastAPI
description: The Python you need to build confidently with FastAPI: virtual environments, type hints, dataclasses, async/await, decorators, error handling, and reading tracebacks.

title: Search and Filtering
description: Add search, filters, and sorting to your FastAPI todo app.

title: Ship It
description: Structure a real FastAPI project, add pagination, handle CORS, rate limit your API, cache with Redis, manage environment variables, write tests with pytest, add structured logging, and track errors with Sentry.

title: Testing with pytest
description: Write automated tests for your FastAPI routes so you know immediately when something breaks.

title: File Uploads
description: Accept and serve file attachments, validate uploads, and handle HTML form submissions with mixed text and file fields.

title: Webhooks
description: Receive, verify, and act on webhook events from external services in your FastAPI todo app.

title: WebSockets
description: Add real-time features to your app - live notifications, instant updates, and a dashboard that refreshes itself.

title: XRP Bill Pay
description: Build a bill payment app on the XRP Ledger - send real XRP payments to payees and anchor each bill record on-chain as permanent, verifiable proof of payment.

title: Todo API with FastAPI
description: Build a typed REST API, call external APIs as a middleman, and connect a JS frontend.

title: Authentication with Flask
description: Add user accounts to your Flask app - signup, login, logout, and protected routes.

title: Password Reset (Flask)
description: Add forgot-password and reset-password routes to your Flask app using secure time-limited tokens.

title: Todo App with Flask
description: Build a database-backed Todo app using Flask's simple, minimal approach.

title: Git Basics
description: Track your code changes, work safely in branches, push to GitHub, and automate tests with GitHub Actions.

title: Stripe Payments
description: Accept payments in a FastAPI app using Stripe's payment intents and webhooks.
